title: Golden Smoky British Fish And Chips
description: Indulgent British dish featuring smoky fish in a shattering cornstarch crust, served with ssam-wrap style chips, FODMAP-friendly and delicious.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together cornstarch, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Dip each cod fillet into the cornstarch mixture, coating evenly.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Fry the coated cod fillets for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the fried cod to a baking sheet and bake in the oven for 10-12 minutes, until cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook the ssam-wrap chips according to package instructions.
Serve the smoky fish with the ssam-wrap chips and a squeeze of lemon.
Garnish with additional smoked paprika and lemon wedges, if desired.
